description: Your dental office Inbox has been contaminated with 5 obvious spam messages that bypassed the mail server filters. Enable adaptive junk mail controls for the 'Local Folders' account and configure it to move new junk messages to the 'Junk' folder. Identify the 5 spam messages in the Inbox using the subjects listed in /home/ga/Desktop/spam_subjects.txt and mark them as junk to ensure they are moved to the Junk folder.
